apiBaseUrl.title: API Base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the API endpoint (no trailing slash). The lookup value is appended or passed as a parameter based on Value Position. Example: http://ip-api.com/json

valuePosition.title: Lookup Value Position
valuePosition.description: How the lookup value is added to the request.

queryParamName.title: Query Parameter Name
queryParamName.description: Query param name when Value Position is 'Query' (e.g., q, ip, ipAddress)

extraQueryParams.title: Extra Query Parameters
extraQueryParams.description: Additional query string appended to every request (no leading ? or &). Example: fields=status,country,city,isp

lookupField.title: Lookup Field
lookupField.description: Event field whose value is sent to the API (e.g., src_ip, ip, hostname)

enrichPrefix.title: Enrichment Field Prefix
enrichPrefix.description: Prefix for all enrichment fields (e.g., geo_ produces geo_country, geo_city)

apiKey.title: API Key / Token
apiKey.description: Leave empty for APIs that don't require auth (like ip-api.com free tier)

authHeaderName.title: Custom Auth Header Name
authHeaderName.description: Header name for 'Custom Header' auth (e.g., X-API-Key, key)

bodyTemplate.title: Request Body Template (POST/PUT, single mode)
bodyTemplate.description: JSON body for POST/PUT. Use {lookup_value} placeholder. Leave empty for default.

selectedFields.title: Selected Response Fields (selective mode)
selectedFields.description: Dot-notation paths to extract (e.g., score, geo.country, tags)

cacheTTL.title: Cache TTL (seconds)
cacheTTL.description: Cache API responses to reduce duplicate lookups. 0 = no caching.

rateLimitMs.title: Rate Limit (ms between requests)
rateLimitMs.description: Minimum ms between API calls. 0 = no limit.

batchEnabled.title: Enable Batch Mode
batchEnabled.description: Buffer multiple events and send one API call per batch. Reduces API calls but adds latency. Requires a batch-capable API endpoint (like ip-api.com /batch). If disabled, each event makes its own API call.

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Number of events to buffer before making the batch API call. ip-api.com /batch supports up to 100 per call. Only used when Batch Mode is enabled.

batchUrl.title: Batch API URL
batchUrl.description: Full URL for the batch endpoint. Only used when Batch Mode is enabled. ip-api.com batch endpoint: http://ip-api.com/batch
